flavourText: An enigmatic figure forged from every argument for existence. Dismantle its logic to win.
Guards the threshold between worlds. Only those who understand what lies beyond may pass.
A creature of contradictions, born from the tension between free will and suffering.
Stands tall for every person. Show you understand equality and it will yield.
Threads of love, commitment, and duty bind this ancient guardian together.
Part warrior, part peacemaker. Only balanced arguments can calm its fury.
Weighs justice against mercy. Tip the scales with your knowledge of punishment aims.
A towering guardian of the natural world, wrapped in vines of responsibility.
Flickers between life and death. Prove you understand the sanctity of both.
Rings bells and calls to prayer across every tradition. Name the celebrations to quiet the noise.
